rulings.Case Title: S PATEL VS. JAMES GELWIX et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS BROUGHT BY DEFENDANT GELWIX DENIED. PROOF OF SERVICE ESTABLISHES THAT PERSONAL SERVICE WAS EFFECTED ON DEFENDANTS TO THIS ACTION BY LALLAUBHAI PATEL A COMPETENT PARTY FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS UNDER THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 414.10. (302/AJR/KS(EX))
